ai.notes: The form uses a custom phone input component and file upload widgets. The 'Cover letter' field allows file upload, but the UI suggests a switch to a text area is possible (though not explicitly rendered in the static HTML).

fields.question: Applicants for employment in Spain must have work authorization that does not now or in the future require sponsorship of a visa for employment authorization in Spain and with Bluecrux. Do you have this authorization?
This role is only open for permanent employment on our payroll. Thus, we are not considering candidates looking for a freelance assignment. Are you willing to be employed on our payroll in Spain?
By applying, I agree to the Bluecrux privacy policy.

After your application, a confirmation message will be sent immediately to the mail adress you used. Please check your SPAM filter if you didn't receive this confirmation, as next steps in the process will be communicated to that adress as well.
I agree that my data are collected and used for recruitment purposes for a period of 3 years.
